General.Name: Kindly MD, Inc.
General.Description: Nakamoto Inc. develops and invests in a global portfolio of Bitcoin-native companies. The company provides commercial and financial infrastructure for the capital markets. The company was formerly known as Kindly MD, Inc. and change its name to Nakamoto Inc. in January 2026. The company was incorporated in 2019 and is based in Nashville, Tennessee.
General.Address: 300 10th Ave South, Nashville, TN, United States, 37203
